word: G2741 - καυσόω - kausóō - kow-so'-o - Fervent heat

sections.paragraph:
- Original: καυσόω

- Transliteration: Kausoo

- Phonetic: kow-so'-o

- Definition:

1. to burn up, set fire to

2. to suffer with feverish burning, be parched with fever

- Origin: from G2740

- TDNT entry: 3:644,*

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2740; to set on fire: - with fervent heat.
